name: Spinach Squares Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the spinach, Monterey Jack cubes, flour, milk, and baking powder in a bowl until well combined.
2. Pour the mixture into a 7 x 11-inch pan.
3. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes (or 350°F for 45 minutes).
4. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
5. Serve warm or cold.
